cass17.desc: A seventeen-year-old American boy with a flat, LOW, bone-dry monotone. Bored and unimpressed, minimal energy, slight vocal fry, medium-low pitch — his voice finished changing years ago. Clean close-mic studio recording.

deshawn.desc: A tall seventeen-year-old with a surprisingly deep, resonant voice for his age — rich, loud, warm, playful trash-talk swagger, laughs easily. NOT childlike; a young man's voice, not a kid's. Clean close-mic studio recording.

peter.desc: A bright, eager English man in his mid-twenties, nineteen-twenties RP. Energetic and earnest but GROUNDED: solid chest voice, natural conversational rhythm, absolutely not breathy, not airy, not sing-song. Speeds up when excited. Clean close-mic studio recording.

milo.desc: A young man with a light, quick, precise tenor voice: clipped diction, fast tempo, faintly amused deadpan, wiry kid-genius energy, narrates everyone's mistakes. Noticeably lighter and faster than his friends. Clean close-mic studio recording.
